name: For Your Information
short_description: First person, single player game about employee who think's that leaving overtime (not paid) in this company is simple.
detailed_description:
BEFORE YOU BUY!

This game is working progress and treat the purchase of the game as support in the game creation process!

About the game

"For Your Information" is a stealth game in which the main character tries to escape from the headquarters of the company where he works on
"paid" and "voluntary" overtime. After leaving the desk, he notice that the company is not satisfied with this fact.
During the game, we will visit many floors, offices, open spaces, and warehouses, where we will discover what this company actually does and meet employees who do not agree to such treatment and even want to do something about it!

Current state

Currently, the game has three levels that present different types of gameplay.
Thanks to these levels and playtest players, we collect feedback on various mechanics, which we improve on an ongoing basis.
Work is currently underway on levels 4, 5 and 6.
If you would like to share your opinion, please visit our Discord server (the link can be found in the game's main menu!)

What's next?

Our plan is to have 12 levels with two different endings based on the decisions you make during the game.
The single-player game will outline the plot of the conflict, in which we will be able to continue to participate in the multiplayer version.
